import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut start = 0
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if start < i
      let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        if v % 2 == 0
          sum = sum + v
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if start < n
  let tok = string.substring(input, start, n)
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    if v % 2 == 0
      sum = sum + v
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end
println("sum_even=#{sum}")
